Body.Content:
Teams events will soon have a separate attendance and engagement report policy from the "CsTeamsMeetingPolicy" attendance and engagement report policy. This will permit admins to allow Teams events organizers to access attendance and engagement reports, while restricting access to Teams meeting attendance and engagement reports.

GA date: August CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Teams events attendance and engagement report policy
